title: Field Mapping
description: A mapping from one or more source fields (with optional transforms) to a single target field. Lineage is mandatory — every target field must declare its source fields and transform function.

targetField.description: Target field path, e.g. manufacturer.name or subject.subjectId

targetType.description: Expected type at the target (canonical type)

alias.description: Alias used in the transform expression

transformSteps.description: Optional ordered sequence of transforms applied before the target assignment

overrideValue.description: Manually-specified target value if transform is bypassed

humanOverride.description: Optional human override — bypasses the transform and sets a fixed target value

nullable.description: Whether the target field may be null if source is missing
